name: Kfa (Kick Fing a) Chili!
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Bell Pepper, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
- Cut the smoked sausage into half-inch chunks. Using more than 1 Lb. will make it taste like spaghetti sauce!
- Drain and reserve half of the liquid from the canned tomatoes.
- Add Cayenne Pepper and Tabasco Sauce for extra heat (see note).
- Mix bean liquid with corn meal until smooth.
- Simmer chili, stirring occasionally, until flavors are well combined.
- Serve with cheese and bread or make a chili sandwich. For best results, freeze and let thaw before serving.
